zh.South Molton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文素斯 莫爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Multon於大約1265年出生在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 莫爾頓。他於1290年與Margarita~在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 莫爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1318年在英國英格蘭戴文皮享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Multon was born about 1265, in South Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Margarita~ in 1290, in South Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1318, in Pinhoe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1318, à Pinhoe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Multonは約1265年にイギリスイギリスデボンソウス モルトンで生まれた。1290年にイギリスイギリスデボンソウス モルトンでMargarita~と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1318年にイギリスイギリスデボンピンhオで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Multon(은)는 대략 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 모턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 모턴에서 Margarita~(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 핀호에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
